revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects G]]

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Grand empress dowagers of Japan | bodyclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress of Japan#List of grand empresses dowager|Grand empresses dowager of Japan]] | group1 = [[:en:Nara period|Nara]]
| list1 = {{Navbox | subgroup | groupwidth = 6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%; | group1 = 710–794 | list1 = *Fujiwara no Miyako }} | group2 = [[:en:Heian period|Heian]] | list2 = {{Navbox | subgroup
| groupwidth = 6.5em
| groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%; | group1 = 794–1185 | list1 = *[[Takano no Niigasa]]{{note label|1|1}} *[[Tachibana no Kachiko]] *[[:en:Princess Seishi|Princess Seishi]] *Fujiwara no Junshi *Fujiwara no Akirakeiko *[[:en:Fujiwara no Onshi|Fujiwara no Onshi]] *[[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]{{note label|1|1}} *[[Princess Masako (Reizei)|Princess Masako]] *[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]] *[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara no Shōshi]] *[[:en:Princess Teishi|Princess Teishi]] *[[:en:Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|Princess Shōshi]] *[[Princess Reishi]] *[[Fujiwara no Tashi]] }}
| group3 = [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]] | list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%; | group1 = 1185–1333 | list1 = *[[Fujiwara no Tashi]] }}
| below = [[File:Japan Kou(tai)gou Flag.svg|border|80px|right|alt=]] ''Years are in [[:en:Common Era|CE]]{{\}}[[:en:Anno Domini|AD]]''{{Space|6.5em}} {{note label|1|1}} individuals that were given the title of grand empress dowager posthumously * [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House]] | belowstyle = background:transparent; padding:0; }}<noinclude> {{documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} }}</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Grand_empress_dowagers_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Grand_empress_dowagers_of_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name = Grand empress dowagers of Japan
| bodyclass = hlist
| state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress of Japan#List of grand empresses dowager|Grand empresses dowager of Japan]]
| group1 = [[:en:Nara period|Nara]]

| list1  =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup
    | groupwidth = 6.5em
    | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
    | group1     = 710–794
    | list1      =
*Fujiwara no Miyako
  }}
| group2 = [[:en:Heian period|Heian]]
| list2  =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup

    | groupwidth = 6.5em

    | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
    | group1     = 794–1185
    | list1      =
*[[Takano no Niigasa]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Tachibana no Kachiko]]
*[[:en:Princess Seishi|Princess Seishi]]
*Fujiwara no Junshi
*Fujiwara no Akirakeiko
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Onshi|Fujiwara no Onshi]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Princess Masako (Reizei)|Princess Masako]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]]
*[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara no Shōshi]]
*[[:en:Princess Teishi|Princess Teishi]]
*[[:en:Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|Princess Shōshi]]
*[[Princess Reishi]]
*[[Fujiwara no Tashi]]
  }}

| group3 = [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]
| list3 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1185–1333
  | list1 =
*[[Fujiwara no Tashi]]
 }}

| below = [[File:Japan Kou(tai)gou Flag.svg|border|80px|right|alt=]]
''Years are in [[:en:Common Era|CE]]{{\}}[[:en:Anno Domini|AD]]''{{Space|6.5em}}
{{note label|1|1}} individuals that were given the title of grand empress dowager posthumously
* [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House]]
| belowstyle = background:transparent; padding:0;
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{collapsible option}}
}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes]]
}}
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
